title: Merging time-tested agricultural practices with modern technologies to drive productivity
description: The content of the Planting Date Advisories was developed into messages and disseminated to farmers across Bihar through the dissemination platforms of BAU, JEEViKA and IFFCO kisan.

status.status_description: This result has been accepted. The status reflects the current review outcome in STAR and may change if the result is updated or reviewed again.
